true_header: This agreement’s purpose is to ensure secrecy and confidentiality of the information to be provided,
All the information that (i) is written and marked as confidential,
The receiving party for purposes of confidentiality is bound by its managers, employees,
Immediately notify the other party of any misappropriation or misuse of confidential information .
The breach of the terms set forth herein imply:
Payment of damages as set forth in section 9 and the applicable law.
Confidential information shall not include information which is:
Publicly available through lawful disclosure; or f.
In case of breach of any obligation set forth herein by the receiving party ,
This agreement binds not only the parties, but also their successors and assignees.

If you the company is not located in latin america countries:
In case of any lawsuit, the parties undertake to request judicial secrecy.
The parties intend to enter into discussions regarding a potential future business relationship; and
Therefore, it is agreed as follows:
In this agreement: confidential information means:-
Information relating to the disclosing party regarding its business, partners,
Those portions of analyses, compilations, studies,

Information of a commercially sensitive nature relating to the disclosing party obtained by observation during any visits to the disclosing party’s premises but subject always to the proviso set out in clause.
Prior to the disclosure of any confidential information to any such personnel,
Save as otherwise permitted herein, a receiving party shall not,
Disclose the confidential information to any third party, either directly or indirectly; or
The fact that discussions or negotiations are taking place between the parties;
The content of any such discussions or negotiations;
Any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to the purpose; or
That confidential information has been requested or received,
It is understood that all communications regarding the parties’ discussions,
These terms and conditions will not apply to any confidential information which:
Is in or becomes part of the public domain or is or otherwise becomes public knowledge by any means other than by breach by a receiving party or their personnel of any obligation contained herein;

Was previously or is at any time hereafter disclosed to a receiving party by any third party having the right to disclose the same provided that such source is not known to the receiving party to be bound by a confidentiality agreement with,
Is released from the provisions of this undertaking by prior written consent given by a director or authorised representative of the disclosing party;
Was otherwise independently acquired or developed by the receiving party without violating its obligations hereunder.
The receiving party shall, immediately upon receipt of notice to that effect:
Return to the disclosing party all confidential information (including all copies held);
Destroy those portions (and all copies) of any analyses, compilations, studies,
Expunge and destroy any confidential information from any computer,
Any notice or other communication given or made under this agreement shall,
If delivered by hand, at the time on the date of actual delivery; or
If sent by fax, with a confirmed receipt of transmission from the receiving machine,
The provisions of this clause shall not apply in relation to the service of documents.
"affiliate" means with respect to any person,
Agreement means this non-disclosure agreement including all appendices (if any).
Client  means any customers or business partners of the party;
Effective date means the date when the last of the parties signed the agreement.
Project has the meaning ascribed to it in clause 4.1.
Use confidential information only for the project;
Was, at the time of its disclosure,
Breach by recipient of its obligations contained in this agreement (or by any person to whom disclosure of information is made as permitted under this agreement);
Breach by a third party of any other obligation or duty of confidentiality or non- disclosure relating to that information that recipient is or ought to be aware of;
Is required to be disclosed by law,
Inform discloser of the circumstances of the disclosure and the information that will be disclosed as soon as reasonably practicable;
Permit discloser in its absolute discretion to seek to obtain an injunction or take other appropriate action to protect the confidential information;
Take all such steps as may be reasonable and practicable in the circumstances to agree the form,
Consult with discloser as to possible steps to prevent or limit such disclosure and take those steps to the extent reasonably practicable in the circumstances,
Request assurances as to confidentiality from anybody to which the confidential information is to be disclosed.
With respect to the confidential information disclosed,
If recipient discloses or distributes confidential information to any of its representatives,
Upon discloser s request, recipient shall promptly,

Where the receiving party is obliged to disclose by law,
Return of confidential information. promptly following the request of the disclosing party,
Term and termination. notwithstanding whether or not the proposed transactions are concluded,
Storage of confidential information. the confidential information must not be copied, reproduced,
